testsuite.name: NotificationService

testcase.name: onMessage: valid JSON is parsed and broadcast
publishAlert: serializes payload and sends to Redis channel
publishAlert: string payload is also published
onMessage: malformed JSON is broadcast as raw string
subscribe: registers NotificationService as listener on ALERT_CHANNEL

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-31T23:47:58.160+07:00 INFO 30107 --- [uip-backend] [ Test worker] c.u.b.n.service.NotificationService : Subscribed to Redis channel: uip:alerts
